Inscriptions are inscriptions of mantras and other such things that people put on their posessions to remind them of the divine

They are descended from the same practice in Epicurean communities<ref>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ir7P1omkgqI</ref>

[[Prayer flags]] are an example of such inscriptions.

They can be done in any language, but the language spoken by the owner is best.

They may be said to bless an item but the main purpose is to remind people of spirituality.

They may be written in many languages together including English in order to represent the universality of the message. Perhaps linked to the [[Five Ancestors]]

== References ==

[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Inscriptions]][[Category:Religious objects]]
[[Category:Pages]]
